hypothesis: Retraining generative models on chemically accurate Kekulized valency data yields generated molecules with geometry and energy metrics (Δr, Δθ, Δφ, ΔE_relax) that more closely match GFN2-xTB-optimized references than models trained on original data, and GFN2-xTB-based metrics provide a more faithful assessment of geometric realism than MMFF-based metrics.
